prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中央财经大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约819名→1254名→1436名→1181名→1809名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年曾短暂回升至1181名，但2 025年大幅后移至1809名，较2024年后移约628名，为近五年最大降幅，显示当年报考热度明显降温；该校在海南省2021–2024年招生计划均为35人，2025年小幅 扩招至36人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中央财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国 大学排名2026年约第42名，较2025年的第45名上升3位，学校综合实力和排名稳中有升；2023年声誉评价为偏负面，主要因新闻传播学类专业投档位次大幅下滑 引发关注；抖音综合热度排名第97位（一般），短视频平台曝光量偏低，未出现明显的报考热度信号；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评 A（全国顶尖），理论经济学获评A-，财经类学科实力位居全国前列，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体社会热度近年有所降温，但中央财经大 学作为财经类顶尖院校仍具较强号召力。海南省2026年高考报名总人数约78000人，较2025年的67408人增加约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次 大幅后移的走势、2026年海南省考生规模显著扩大（竞争加剧）、学校排名小幅上升（吸引力略增）以及财经类热度整体降温等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准上继 续小幅后移。预测最低位次约1839名，区间1563–2115名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融科技（北航计算机联培项目）
- 保险学（北理工智能、保险联培项目）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学、资产评估等）
- 精算学
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（会计学、财务管理）
- 金融学（含金融学、金融学北外英语专业联培）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工商管理类（商学院）（工商管理、市场营销、人力资源管理、供应链管理）
- 法学（含卓越法治人才、涉外法治基地班、双学位项目）
- 金融学类（金融工程、金融科技）
- 经济学类（经济学、国民经济管理）
- 管理科学与工程类（管理科学、工程管理）
- 投资学（含大数据双学位项目）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 金融学（国际金融与公司理财）
- 经济与贸易类（国际经济与贸易、国际商务、贸易经济）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（1563–2115名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如1600名以内），可重点冲刺金融科 技、财政学类等应用经济学A级学科专业；若位次接近区间上限（如2000名以外），建议优先考虑三档专业并搭配二档中位次要求较低的专业，以提高录取概率。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category of Central University of Finance and Economics in Hainan Province were approximately 819 → 1254 → 1436 → 1181 → 1809, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, there was a brief recovery to 1181, but in 2025, it significantly dropped to 1809, a backward shift of about 628 places compared to 2024, marking the largest decline in five years, indicating a notable cooling of application enthusiasm that year. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province was 35 students from 2021 to 2024, with a slight expansion to 36 students in 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 42nd, up 3 places from 45th in 2025, showing steady improvement in overall strength and ranking. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a significant decline in the admission rankings of journalism and communication majors, which attracted attention. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 97th (average), with low exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious signal of application heat. No records of admission gaps were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A (top in the country), and Theoretical Economics was rated A-, indicating that its finance and economics disciplines are among the best in the country, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled in recent years, but Central University of Finance and Economics, as a top finance and economics institution, still has strong appeal. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the number of candidates and intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the notable increase in the number of candidates in Hainan Province in 2026 (intensified competition), the slight rise in the university's ranking (slightly increased appeal), and the overall cooling of finance and economics popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1839, with a range of 1563 to 2115.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Financial Technology (Beihang University Computer Science Joint Training Program)
- Insurance (Beijing Institute of Technology Intelligent Insurance Joint Training Program)
- Finance and Taxation (Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation, etc.)
- Actuarial Science
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (Accounting, Financial Management)
- Finance (including Finance, Finance and Beijing Foreign Studies University English Joint Training Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration (Business School) (Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Law (including Outstanding Legal Talent, Foreign-Related Legal Base Class, Dual Degree Programs)
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Economics (Economics, National Economic Management)
- Management Science and Engineering (Management Science, Engineering Management)
- Investment (including Big Data Dual Degree Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Finance (International Finance and Corporate Finance)
- Economics and Trade (International Economics and Trade, International Business, Trade Economics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (1563–2115), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1600), you can prioritize applying for Tier 1 majors such as Financial Technology and Finance and Taxation, which are part of the A-level Applied Economics discipline. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 2000), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors and combine them with Tier 2 majors that have lower ranking requirements to increase the probability of admission.
